case_title: DENNIS MORIARTY VS. KYLE NEWGENT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70736204) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70665303), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST SERVED AUG-13-2023, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70736204) AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2916 TARAVAL STREET #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70857444)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70665303), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIARTY, DENNIS TRUSTEE OF THE MORIARTY FAMILY REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST SERVED AUG-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWGENT, KYLE
